RWisecondorX 0.0.0.9001
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

COMPRESSED_BINSIZE
Compressed bin size for synthetic cohort BAMs
CombinedControlGroup()
NIPTeR control group for CombinedStrands samples
CombinedStrandsSample()
NIPTeR sample with combined forward+reverse read counts
NCVTemplate()
Pre-computed NCV denominator template
NIPTControlGroup()
Abstract base class for NIPTeR control groups
NIPTCorrectionRecord()
Correction record for a NIPTeR sample
NIPTSample()
Abstract base class for NIPTeR bin-count samples
SeparatedControlGroup()
NIPTeR control group for SeparatedStrands samples
SeparatedStrandsSample()
NIPTeR sample with separate forward and reverse read counts
WisecondorXObject()
Abstract base class for WisecondorX list-like objects
WisecondorXPrediction()
WisecondorX prediction result
WisecondorXReference()
WisecondorX reference panel
WisecondorXReferenceQC()
WisecondorX reference QC report
WisecondorXSample()
WisecondorX binned sample
autosomal_matrix()
Extract the autosomal read-count matrix from a NIPTSample
bam_convert()
Count reads per bin from a BAM or CRAM file
bam_convert_bed()
Convert BAM/CRAM to a bgzipped BED bin-count file
bam_convert_npz()
Convert BAM/CRAM to WisecondorX NPZ format
bed_to_nipter_sample()
Read a NIPTeR-format BED file into a NIPTeRSample
bed_to_sample()
Read a WisecondorX-format BED file into a sample list
control_names()
Sample names of a control group
fractions_auto()
Extract collapsed 22 x N autosomal chromosome fractions from a control group
fractions_for_regression()
Extract fractions suitable for regression
generate_cohort()
Generate a synthetic BAM cohort for testing
n_bins()
Number of bins in a NIPTSample
n_controls()
Number of samples in a control group
nipter_as_control_group()
Build a NIPTeR control group from a list of binned samples
nipter_bin_bam()
Bin a BAM/CRAM file — NIPTeR style
nipter_bin_bam_bed()
Bin a BAM/CRAM and write NIPTeR-style counts to a bgzipped BED
nipter_chi_correct()
Chi-squared correction for overdispersed bins
nipter_control_group_from_beds()
Load a NIPTeR control group from a directory of TSV.bgz files
nipter_diagnose_control_group()
Diagnose a NIPTeR control group
nipter_gc_correct()
GC-correct a NIPTeR sample or control group
nipter_gc_precompute()
Pre-compute and save per-bin GC content to a TSV.bgz file
nipter_match_control_group()
Select best-matching controls for a sample
nipter_match_matrix()
Compute the full pairwise SSD matrix for a control group
nipter_ncv_score()
Normalised Chromosome Value (NCV) score
nipter_predict_sex()
Predict fetal sex for a NIPTeR sample
nipter_reference_frame()
Build a chromosome-level reference frame from a NIPTeR control group
nipter_regression()
Regression-based Z-score for trisomy prediction
nipter_sample_to_bed()
Write an in-memory NIPTeRSample to a bgzipped BED file
nipter_sex_model()
Build a sex prediction model from a NIPTeR control group
nipter_sex_model_y_unique()
Build a sex prediction model from Y-unique ratios
nipter_y_unique_ratio()
Compute Y-unique region read ratio from a BAM file
nipter_z_score()
Chromosomal Z-score
rwisecondorx_newref()
Build a WisecondorX reference from binned samples
rwisecondorx_predict()
Predict copy number aberrations using WisecondorX
rwisecondorx_ref_qc()
QC a native WisecondorX reference
scale_sample()
Scale a binned sample to a new bin size
sex_matrix()
Extract the sex-chromosome read-count matrix from a NIPTSample
simulate_trisomy_bam()
Simulate a trisomy BAM by thinning a donor alignment
simulate_trisomy_cohort()
Simulate a trisomy cohort from donor BAMs/CRAMs
sra_runinfo_url() download_sra_runinfo() read_sra_runinfo()
SRA Run Metadata Utilities
strand_type()
Return the strand type of a NIPTSample
wisecondorx_convert()
Convert BAM/CRAM to WisecondorX NPZ format (upstream CLI wrapper)
wisecondorx_newref()
Build a WisecondorX reference panel
wisecondorx_predict()
Predict copy-number aberrations with WisecondorX
write_wisecondorx_output()
Write prediction output files

Developed by Sounkou Mahamane Toure.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
